title: Senior Commercial Executive
description:
Essential Functions

1. Chartering and Commercial Operations:

  • Execute chartering activities across spot, COA, and time charter fixtures in accordance with the contracts, company strategy and approval frameworks.
  • Prepare, review, negotiate, and administer charter party agreements and related commercial documentation.
  • Acts as a primary commercial point of contact for assigned vessels, charterers, brokers, and vessel managers.
  • Monitor compliance with charter party terms and escalate deviations or risks where required.

2. Commercial Performance and Reporting

  • Monitor vessel utilisation, hire performance, off-hire events, and commercial KPIs.
  • Prepare regular commercial performance reports and analysis for management review.
  • Prepare and maintain a rolling fleet deployment outlook as part of regular commercial reporting, including scenario analysis where relevant.
  • Support assessment of commercial exposure, risks and mitigation measures.

3. Stakeholder and Market Interface

  • Liaise with brokers, charterers, and counterparties on commercial and operational matters.
  • Support relationship management with customers and commercial partners.
  • Assist with market analysis, freight benchmarking, and competitor monitoring

4. Business Support and Development

  • Support business development initiatives, including preparation of commercial proposals and market assessments.
  • Provide commercial input to internal discussions on fleet deployment, new projects, and operational planning.

Minimum Requirements & Qualifications

  • Minumum3-5 years of direct experience in a commercial, chartering, or operations role within the shipping industry.
  • Proven experience with tanker vessels is preferred, with specific experience in crude oil or liquefied gas tankers being highly advantageous.
  • Working knowledge of shipping contracts (e.g., Charter Parties), regulations, and commercial best practices.
  • A solid understanding of shipping economics, freight rate calculations, and market dynamics.
  • Clear negotiation and communication skills, with the ability to influence and build strong relationships.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities to make data-driven decisions.
  • High level of proficiency in relevant software and data analysis tools.

postedCompany.description:
We are committed to driving positive change within the maritime industry. Our primary focus is to make our comprehensive range of sustainable energy offerings accessible to all.


Mission

With a mission to promote sustainability and environmental responsibility, we strive to provide innovative solutions and ensure that clean energy resources are available to a wide audience. SFI Energy is at the forefront of the effort to create a more sustainable future for all.


Vision 

An enterprise which created sustainable value for all stakeholders through embracing change, promoting innovation and nurturing people.
postedCompany.name: SFI ENERGY PTE. LTD.
